items.title_en: Asia stock markets slide as tech shares slump
items.title_zh: 随着科技股暴跌，亚洲股市下滑
items.desc_en: Trading on South Korea's Kospi index was halted for the third time this week to prevent panic selling.
items.desc_zh: 韩国综合股价指数交易本周第三次暂停，以防止恐慌性抛售。

items.title_en: Binance to stop providing services to European clients after failing to obtain license: Financial Times
items.title_zh: 金融时报：币安因未能获得许可而停止向欧洲客户提供服务
items.desc_en: All crypto companies have to obtain a license under the bloc's Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation by July 1, or risk penalties.
items.desc_zh: 所有加密货币公司都必须在 7 月 1 日之前根据欧盟加密资产市场监管获得许可证，否则将面临处罚。

items.title_en: SK Hynix prepares U.S. listing at $166 per share — here's why HSBC says it could be worth 20% more
items.title_zh: SK 海力士准备以每股 166 美元的价格在美国上市——这就是汇丰银行表示其股价可能上涨 20% 的原因
items.desc_en: HSBC analysts see the South Korean chipmaker's foray into U.S. markets as the catalyst to narrow the valuation gap with rival Micron Technology.
items.desc_zh: 汇丰银行分析师认为，这家韩国芯片制造商进军美国市场是缩小与竞争对手美光科技估值差距的催化剂。

items.title_en: U.S.-Iran peace deal grants access to Tehran's nuclear sites, UN watchdog says
items.title_zh: 联合国监督机构称，美伊和平协议允许进入德黑兰核设施
items.desc_en: "The technical work has started, and we hope to be there soon," IAEA chief Rafael Grossi said at a news conference in Japan on Friday.
items.desc_zh: 国际原子能机构总干事拉斐尔·格罗西周五在日本举行的新闻发布会上表示：“技术工作已经开始，我们希望很快就能到达。”

items.title_en: Reflecting Pool liner cut with sharp knife or razor, National Park Service says
items.title_zh: 国家公园管理局表示，用锋利的刀或剃刀切割的反射池衬垫
items.desc_en: Earlier in the week Donald Trump blamed vandals for "a 300 foot long gash" in the pool and accused someone of putting fertiliser in the water.
items.desc_zh: 本周早些时候，唐纳德·特朗普指责蓄意破坏者在泳池中造成了“300英尺长的伤口”，并指责有人在水中添加了化肥。

items.title_en: NBA targets Asian resurgence with technology and talent push
items.title_zh: NBA通过技术和人才推动亚洲复兴
items.desc_en: Southeast Asia has emerged as one of the NBA's fastest-growing markets for fan engagement, making the region a focal point for both player development and business expansion.
items.desc_zh: 东南亚已成为 NBA 球迷参与度增长最快的市场之一，使该地区成为球员发展和业务扩张的焦点。

items.title_en: Goldman says private credit may invest a lot of 'dry powder' in this sector
items.title_zh: 高盛表示私人信贷可能会在该领域投入大量“干粉”
items.desc_en: Private credit may use its sizable amount of "dry powder" to combat potential financing market dislocations in this sector, according to Goldman Sachs.
items.desc_zh: 高盛表示，私人信贷可能会利用其大量的“干火药”来应对该领域潜在的融资市场混乱。

items.title_en: Oil slides 2% as markets look past fresh Iran tensions and focus on supply outlook
items.title_zh: 市场关注伊朗新紧张局势并关注供应前景，油价下跌 2%
items.desc_en: Oil extended declines on Friday, with markets focused any further breakthroughs in the Middle East conflict, while digesting a flurry of news from the region.
items.desc_zh: 周五油价延续跌势，市场关注中东冲突的进一步突破，同时消化来自该地区的一系列消息。

items.title_en: Airwallex hits $11 billion valuation with $320 million raise as fintech pushes into finance run by AI agents
items.title_zh: 随着金融科技进军人工智能代理运营的金融领域，Airwallex 融资 3.2 亿美元，估值达到 110 亿美元
items.desc_en: Airwallex raised $320 million to build the financial infrastructure powering a world where AI agents handle business payments and finance.
items.desc_zh: Airwallex 筹集了 3.2 亿美元，用于建设金融基础设施，为人工智能代理处理商业支付和财务的世界提供动力。

items.title_en: UN agency pauses Hormuz ship evacuation plan after first vessel attack under peace deal
items.title_zh: 和平协议下首次船只遇袭后，联合国机构暂停霍尔木兹船只疏散计划
items.desc_en: The pause follows a container ship being struck near the coast of Oman on Thursday, with a U.S. official saying that Iran was responsible for the attack.
items.desc_zh: 周四，一艘集装箱船在阿曼海岸附近遭到袭击，一名美国官员表示伊朗应对此次袭击负责。

items.title_en: SoftBank sinks 12% as Asia tech rout tracks declines in the U.S.
items.title_zh: 亚洲科技股追随美国科技股的颓势，软银股价下跌 12%
items.desc_en: SoftBank Group plunged, leading a broad selloff in Asian technology stocks amid mounting concerns over the rising cost of artificial intelligence infrastructure.
items.desc_zh: 由于人们对人工智能基础设施成本不断上升的担忧日益加剧，软银集团股价暴跌，导致亚洲科技股广泛抛售。

items.title_en: Row over alleged theft of donations from India's landmark Ram temple
items.title_zh: 印度地标性建筑拉姆神庙捐赠品被盗 引发争议
items.desc_en: Questions are being raised over the handling of cash, valuable jewellery, gold and silver offered by devotees.
items.desc_zh: 人们对信徒提供的现金、贵重珠宝、金银的处理提出了质疑。

items.title_en: Teens who hacked TfL were known to police years before cyber-attack
items.title_zh: 警方在网络攻击发生前几年就知道黑客入侵伦敦交通局的青少年
items.desc_en: Owen Flowers and Thalha Jubair were convicted for their roles in the attack, which led to large costs for Transport for London.
items.desc_zh: 欧文·弗劳尔斯（Owen Flowers）和塔哈·朱贝尔（Thalha Jubair）因参与袭击而被定罪，这给伦敦交通局带来了巨额损失。

items.title_en: The abundant but expensive energy source that's under your feet
items.title_zh: 你脚下丰富但昂贵的能源
items.desc_en: Start-ups are taking fresh approaches to geothermal energy, but will the economics work?
items.desc_zh: 初创企业正在采取新的地热能方法，但经济有效吗？

items.title_en: Aurora
items.title_zh: Aurora
items.desc_en: Mac notch command center for productivity with tool access
items.desc_zh: Mac notch 命令中心通过工具访问提高生产力

items.title_en: S&P 500 futures are little changed as index heads for losing week: Live updates
items.title_zh: 标普 500 指数期货几乎没有变化，指数将迎来本周下跌：实时更新
items.desc_en: The technology-dominant Nasdaq Composite and broad S&P 500 index are both on pace to end the trading week in the red.
items.desc_zh: 以科技股为主的纳斯达克综合指数和广泛的标准普尔 500 指数都将在本周交易中出现亏损。

items.title_en: Basedash for Excel
items.title_zh: Basedash for Excel
items.desc_en: Turn any Excel file into a live dashboard
items.desc_zh: 将任何 Excel 文件变成实时仪表板

items.title_en: On Semiconductor strikes $7 billion deal for Synaptics in physical AI push
items.title_zh: 安森美半导体与 Synaptics 达成 70 亿美元交易，推动物理 AI 发展
items.desc_en: On Semiconductor said the deal bumps up its total addressable market by $30 billion to $243 billion by 2030.
items.desc_zh: 安森美半导体表示，到 2030 年，这笔交易将使其潜在市场总额增加 300 亿美元，达到 2,430 亿美元。

items.title_en: Rescuers search rubble for survivors as Venezuela earthquakes kill at least 188
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉地震造成至少 188 人死亡，救援人员在废墟中搜寻幸存者
items.desc_en: Nearly 1,500 people have been injured after two seven-plus magnitude shallow quakes hit seconds apart.
items.desc_zh: 两次相隔数秒的七级以上浅层地震已造成近 1,500 人受伤。

items.title_en: Ariel’s John Rogers likes these small-cap names as the market rally broadens
items.title_zh: 随着市场反弹扩大，阿里尔的约翰·罗杰斯喜欢这些小盘股
items.desc_en: Ariel Investments' John Rogers highlighted for-profit education company Covista as a small-cap stock he's currently bullish on.
items.desc_zh: Ariel Investments 的约翰·罗杰斯 (John Rogers) 强调，营利性教育公司 Covista 是他目前看好的小盘股。

items.title_en: Small caps are booming this year. Here are Wall Street's top smaller picks
items.title_zh: 小盘股今年蓬勃发展。以下是华尔街精选的小型股票
items.desc_en: Small cap stocks are on pace to notch their best first half of the year since 1991, and TD Cowen and Bank of America have ideas about how to play the trend.
items.desc_zh: 小盘股有望创下自 1991 年以来最好的上半年表现，TD Cowen 和美国银行对于如何应对这一趋势有自己的想法。

items.title_en: UN pauses Strait of Hormuz evacuation plan after cargo ship attacked
items.title_zh: 货船遇袭后联合国暂停霍尔木兹海峡疏散计划
items.desc_en: The ship was reportedly struck by an "unknown projectile" near Oman but no casualties were reported.
items.desc_zh: 据报道，该船在阿曼附近被“不明弹丸”击中，但没有人员伤亡的报道。

items.title_en: Group Subscriptions by beehiiv
items.title_zh: Group Subscriptions by beehiiv
items.desc_en: Sell subscriptions to teams, companies, and organizations.
items.desc_zh: 向团队、公司和组织出售订阅。

items.title_en: Women alleging rape and sexual assault in France call to abolish statute of limitations
items.title_zh: 法国指控强奸和性侵犯的妇女呼吁废除诉讼时效
items.desc_en: More than 50 women are calling for the abolition of the statute of limitations which they say has prevented them seeking justice.
items.desc_zh: 超过 50 名妇女呼吁废除诉讼时效，她们说诉讼时效阻碍了她们寻求正义。

items.title_en: Supreme Court allows Trump to end protected status for Haitian and Syrian immigrants
items.title_zh: 最高法院允许特朗普终止对海地和叙利亚移民的保护地位
items.desc_en: The ruling opens the path for the Trump administration to deport hundreds of thousands of immigrants who have been living in the US for years.
items.desc_zh: 这项裁决为特朗普政府驱逐数十万在美国生活多年的移民开辟了道路。

items.title_en: Apple hikes MacBook and iPad prices, blaming rising chip costs
items.title_zh: 苹果提高MacBook和iPad价格，归咎于芯片成本上涨
items.desc_en: Apple said it had "never seen a component price increase this much, this quickly".
items.desc_zh: 苹果表示，“从未见过零部件价格上涨如此之快”。

items.title_en: Cewsco
items.title_zh: Cewsco
items.desc_en: All-in-one AI assistant — chat, images, voice & market data
items.desc_zh: 一体化人工智能助手——聊天、图像、语音和市场数据

items.title_en: Earthquake is devastating blow to Venezuela at time of uncertainty
items.title_zh: 在充满不确定性的时期，地震对委内瑞拉造成毁灭性打击
items.desc_en: The twin quakes come less than six months after Venezuela's then-leader Nicolás Maduro was seized by US forces.
items.desc_zh: 这两次地震发生在委内瑞拉时任领导人尼古拉斯·马杜罗被美军抓获后不到六个月。

items.title_en: Key figure in South Africa police corruption scandal pleads guilty
items.title_zh: 南非警察腐败丑闻关键人物认罪
items.desc_en: Prosecutors say Vusimusi "Cat" Matlala could provide evidence against "high-ranking officials".
items.desc_zh: 检察官表示，“猫”乌西穆西·马特拉拉可以提供针对“高级官员”的证据。

items.title_en: Europe's heatwave shifts east as France raises health alert to highest level
items.title_zh: 法国将健康警报提升至最高级别，欧洲热浪东移
items.desc_en: Temperatures in Germany could hit 40C in some areas while French officials say deaths linked to the heat are being seen among young people.
items.desc_zh: 德国部分地区气温可能达到 40 摄氏度，而法国官员表示，年轻人中出现了因高温而死亡的情况。

items.title_en: Ryanair says it will reluctantly let parents sit next to children for free
items.title_zh: 瑞安航空表示将不情愿地让父母免费坐在孩子旁边
items.desc_en: The airline had typically charged adults a fee of £8 each way to sit with their young children.
items.desc_zh: 该航空公司通常向成人收取单程 8 英镑的费用，以便与年幼的孩子坐在一起。

items.title_en: People flee as building collapses on Caracas outskirts
items.title_zh: 加拉加斯郊区建筑物倒塌，人们逃离
items.desc_en: The capital and its surrounding areas have seen some of the worst damage from the 7.2 and 7.5 quakes, which hit a minute apart.
items.desc_zh: 首都及其周边地区在 7.2 级和 7.5 级地震中遭受了最严重的损失，两次地震的发生时间相隔一分钟。

items.title_en: IBM hails new 'block of flats' design breakthrough for ultra tiny chips
items.title_zh: IBM 欢呼超微型芯片的新“公寓”设计突破
items.desc_en: IBM says it has created the world's first known chip tech below 1 nanometre - but it will be some time before it's ready for production.
items.desc_zh: IBM 表示，它已经创造了世界上第一个已知的 1 纳米以下的芯片技术，但距离投入生产还需要一段时间。

items.title_en: Police seal off key roads in Nairobi as Kenya braces for Gen Z protests
items.title_zh: 肯尼亚为 Z 世代抗议做好准备，警方封锁了内罗毕的主要道路
items.desc_en: Protesters demand justice for more than 80 people killed during the 2024 demonstrations and last year's anniversary protests.
items.desc_zh: 抗议者要求为 2024 年示威活动和去年周年纪念抗议活动中丧生的 80 多人伸张正义。

items.title_en: GTA 6 - all you need to know about Rockstar's blockbuster game
items.title_zh: GTA 6 - 关于 Rockstar 的热门游戏您需要了解的一切
items.desc_en: Rockstar's sixth game in the franchise is set to be the biggest game release of the year.
items.desc_zh: Rockstar 系列的第六款游戏将成为今年发行量最大的游戏。

items.title_en: Oil price falls to levels not seen since before Iran war
items.title_zh: 油价跌至伊朗战争前未见的水平
items.desc_en: Energy prices have been on a wild ride since Iran responded to US and Israeli attacks by effectively closing the Strait of Hormuz.
items.desc_zh: 自从伊朗通过有效关闭霍尔木兹海峡来回应美国和以色列的袭击以来，能源价格一直在疯狂上涨。

items.title_en: One of India's largest gold exporters paid its managing director just $180 a month, investigators say in accounting probe
items.title_zh: 调查人员在会计调查中称，印度最大的黄金出口商之一每月仅向其总经理支付 180 美元
items.desc_en: Indian authorities have found accounting discrepancies in books of Indian gold company Rajesh Exports, and owner of Swiss refiner Valcambi.
items.desc_zh: 印度当局发现印度黄金公司 Rajesh Exports 和瑞士精炼商 Valcambi 的所有者的账簿存在会计差异。

items.title_en: Anthropic's latest hiring spree reveals where it's building AI data centers next
items.title_zh: Anthropic 最新的招聘热潮揭示了下一步将在哪里建设人工智能数据中心
items.desc_en: The AI lab is hiring for AI data center roles in Australia and Japan as it rushes to expand compute capacity overseas.
items.desc_zh: 该人工智能实验室正在澳大利亚和日本招聘人工智能数据中心职位，以急于扩大海外计算能力。

items.desc_zh: 当您需要锁定时，让 AI 为您屏蔽干扰

items.title_en: Trump asks Congress for $87bn, mostly for 'urgent' Iran war costs
items.title_zh: 特朗普向国会请求 870 亿美元，主要用于“紧急”的伊朗战争费用
items.desc_en: But the budget faces an uphill battle, coming a day after lawmakers rebuked Trump's military action.
items.desc_zh: 但在立法者谴责特朗普的军事行动的第二天，预算面临着一场艰苦的战斗。

items.desc_zh: Rockstar 表示，该游戏的实体副本将包含该游戏的数字下载代码。

items.title_zh: 谷歌 YouTube 与青少年就社交媒体成瘾案达成和解

items.desc_zh: 这位 15 岁的原告对另外三家科技巨头的诉讼将于下个月开始。

items.title_en: Meta halts worker tracking for AI training due to privacy fears
items.title_zh: 由于担心隐私问题，Meta 停止追踪人工智能培训的员工
items.desc_en: The company had started just two months ago tracking workers’ computer usage for AI training data.
items.desc_zh: 该公司两个月前才开始跟踪员工的计算机使用情况以获取人工智能培训数据。

items.title_en: Steam Machine launches with £879 price tag as Valve cites component costs
items.title_zh: Valve 称 Steam Machine 的组件成本为 879 英镑
items.desc_en: Valve said the cost of its PC-console hybrid reflects a broader trend of component costs rising over time.
items.desc_zh: Valve表示，其PC-控制台混合体的成本反映了组件成本随着时间的推移而上升的更广泛趋势。

items.title_en: How 100 hospitals switched to pen and paper to defeat a national cyber-attack
items.title_zh: 100 家医院如何改用笔和纸来抵御全国性网络攻击
items.desc_en: For four days, dozens of Romanian hospitals went offline, as cyber-experts sought to defeat the hackers.
items.desc_zh: 四天内，数十家罗马尼亚医院关闭，网络专家试图击败黑客。

items.title_en: Millions in UK could claim share of £3bn after Apple case given green light
items.title_zh: 苹果案获得批准后，英国数百万人可索赔 30 亿英镑
items.desc_en: Apple rejected the suggestion its practices are anti-competitive, saying many customers rely on third-party alternatives.
items.desc_zh: 苹果否认了其做法反竞争的说法，称许多客户依赖第三方替代品。
